hooks.command: cd /path/to/project && npx tsc -b --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; if [ ${PIPESTATUS[0]} -ne 0 ]; then echo '\n❌ TypeScript errors found. Fix them before building.'; exit 1; fi
cd /path/to/project && npx tsc -b --noEmit 2>&1 | tail -20; EXIT=$?; if [ $EXIT -ne 0 ]; then echo '\n⚠️  TypeScript errors introduced. Please fix before continuing.'; fi; exit 0
